title: Verify INGEST SQLite state and retention
steps: Use a real temporary ingest.db to exercise migrations, immutable revisions, approval invalidation, unique identities, foreign keys, per-batch locking, incomplete retention, completion compaction, abandonment, and state-checked cleanup.
expected: Transactions and constraints enforce the design; incomplete state remains resumable; completed state contains metadata only; active recovery state cannot be cleaned; cleanup never changes a source or canonical LEDGER effect.
